raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder is in archive/ and not executed; INDEXED_PATHS includes 'packages/swarm' but not 'packages/swarm/archive', so no files are indexed.", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py out of archive/, update INDEXED_PATHS to include correct swarm paths, and run builder."}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "memory/swarm/code-index.json", "issue": "built_at timestamp is recent but modules/endpoints are 0 — indicates silent failure.", "recommended_fix": "Verify builder execution in CI/CD; add failure alert."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index corruption risks systemic blindness — we cannot verify system state.", "next_files_to_read": ["package.json", ".github/workflows"]}

findings.issue: Index builder is in archive/ and not executed; INDEXED_PATHS includes 'packages/swarm' but not 'packages/swarm/archive', so no files are indexed.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, update INDEXED_PATHS to include correct swarm paths, and run builder.

findings.issue: built_at timestamp is recent but modules/endpoints are 0 — indicates silent failure.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify builder execution in CI/CD; add failure alert.

whistleblower_flag: Index corruption risks systemic blindness — we cannot verify system state.
